source_analysis: Two disconnected clusters: cluster 1 = api.py→auth.py, cluster 2 = ui.py→db.py. No edges between clusters. Each cluster has 1 bridge and 1 boundary. No hotspots (each source node has degree=1, score=4, but relative criterion requires out_degree>0 which both have — so both api.py and ui.py should be hotspots via relative criterion). No entrypoints. Paths relative to scenario input.
